segments.text: These are the journeys of the children of Israel, which went forth out of the land of Egypt with their armies under the hand of Moses and Aaron.
And Moses wrote their goings out according to their journeys by the commandment of the LORD: and these are their journeys according to their goings out.

And they departed from Rameses in the first month, on the fifteenth day of the first month; on the morrow after the passover the children of Israel went out with an high hand in the sight of all the Egyptians.
For the Egyptians buried all their firstborn, which the LORD had smitten among them: upon their gods also the LORD executed judgments.
And the children of Israel removed from Rameses, and pitched in Succoth.
And they removed from the desert of Sinai, and pitched at Kibroth-hattaavah.

footnotes: Kibroth-hattaavah: that is, the graves of lust

segments.text: And Aaron the priest went up into mount Hor at the commandment of the LORD, and died there, in the fortieth year after the children of Israel were come out of the land of Egypt, in the first day of the fifth month.
And they departed from Oboth, and pitched in Ije-abarim, in the border of Moab.
And they pitched by Jordan, from Beth-jesimoth even unto Abel-shittim in the plains of Moab.

footnotes: Abel-shittim: or, the plains of Shittim

segments.text: And the LORD spake unto Moses in the plains of Moab by Jordan near Jericho, saying,
Speak unto the children of Israel, and say unto them, When ye are passed over Jordan into the land of Canaan;
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Speak unto the children of Israel, and say unto them, When ye are passed over Jordan into the land of Canaan;
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Then ye shall drive out all the inhabitants of the land from before you, and destroy all their pictures, and destroy all their molten images, and quite pluck down all their high places:
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: And ye shall divide the land by lot for an inheritance among your families: and to the more ye shall give the more inheritance, and to the fewer ye shall give the less inheritance: every man's inheritance shall be in the place where his lot falleth; according to the tribes of your fathers ye shall inherit.
segments.speaker: The LORD

footnotes: give the more…: Heb. multiply his inheritance
give the less…: Heb. diminish his inheritance
